response.justification: While the candidate has strong foundational experience in C, Linux, and software development spanning 15+ years, this is not the right fit for this role. The job explicitly requires native-level Japanese proficiency—the candidate lists English, Romanian, and German but no Japanese. Additionally, the candidate's recent career (last 5 years) has focused on web and cloud technologies, while this role requires embedded systems and security expertise that was last demonstrated 10+ years ago. The specific security technologies mentioned (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, kernel vulnerability countermeasures) are not evident in the candidate's background.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software development with proven ability to work across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong C/C++ and Linux systems programming background from roles at National Instruments and embedded projects
Demonstrated software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD practices, and infrastructure management experience
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency despite explicit native-level requirement in job description
Recent career trajectory (last 5 years) focused on web/cloud technologies; last significant embedded systems work was 10+ years ago
No demonstrated experience with required security technologies: MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, authentication systems, encryption, or kernel vulnerability countermeasures
